summary:
MEL GIBSON AND ENTERTAINMENT VISIONS: Brandon shares a vision regarding Mel Gibson, suggesting the actor needs a 50 million dollar budget for a new biblical movie. Brandon claims that occult forces in Hollywood are actively attempting to sabotage the film's ratings and success. He advocates for a strictly biblical approach rather than a fictional one, expressing his belief that the project will spark a worldwide spiritual revival in theaters and serve as a major tool for an end-time harvest.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF THREATS AND INFRASTRUCTURE: Brandon recounts multiple visions, including a faded red Santa Fe boxcar transporting a silver device with green lettering headed north. He describes another vision involving a biological pathogen in a glass container being smuggled from Russia into the United States via Cuba during the night. Additionally, Brandon claims to have seen riots, fires, and anti-immigration protests erupting in Las Vegas and Dallas.

POLITICAL FIGURES AND NATIONAL SECURITY: Brandon calls for intense protective prayers over the United States, specifically focusing on dates between the 14th and the Fourth of July. He emphasizes the need to pray for Donald Trump, his granddaughter Kai, his sons, JD Vance, and various senators to shield them from harm. Brandon also claims to have foreseen a future military strike against Iran involving a white, triangular missile marked with USA, and he urges his audience to pray for the safety of American troops stationed in Iraq due to potential retaliation.

WEATHER ANOMALIES AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon interprets record-breaking rainfall in Oklahoma as a divine symbol of an upcoming spiritual outpouring, predicting that the Interstate 35 corridor from Wichita to Dallas-Fort Worth will become a massive hub for an end-time movement. He shares a vision of an artificially seeded, man-made hurricane forming in the Atlantic Ocean, prompting him to urge prayers for Florida's protection. He also reiterates previous claims about a massive volcano in Oregon and an impending inland tsunami.

INTERNATIONAL CONFLICTS AND MIDDLE EAST GEOPOLITICS: Brandon asserts that Israel possesses highly advanced, unprecedented technological weaponry guided by divine intervention, making it a hidden military powerhouse. He envisions a severe crippling of Iran's infrastructure, leaving the country in darkness, and predicts geopolitical shifts involving Russia, North Korea, Turkey, Pakistan, and Afghanistan in alignment with biblical prophecies. Furthermore, Brandon describes a vision of a massive, divinely placed oil deposit in the Mediterranean Sea.

COSMIC ANOMALIES AND UNDERGROUND MILITARY OPERATIONS: Brandon details a vision of a large purple dragon emerging from the Atlantic Ocean. He claims the Earth's magnetic poles are shifting and the planet's tilt is altering, which he believes will cause the sun to appear dimmer and disrupt animal behaviors. Brandon also shares a vision of a split sky showing simultaneous day and night. Finally, he claims to have seen secret underground military preparations, including Marines, supplies, and vehicles hidden beneath the Smoky Mountains in Tennessee, which he attributes to preparations for a major catastrophic event.
rawData: [June 13, 2025]-[Praying over June 14 all the way through July 6 - high alert]-[https://youtu.be/zz3aEtVV9fM]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Well, I have my sweetheart with me. She's been busy. I told her, I said, "Honey, you've got to stop and do a video with me." I said, "The people are going to think you disappeared. You haven't been with me in over a week or so." And she's been working really hard, folks, trying to do all the emails, send out the Bibles, and do all the things that we know that God's called us to do. And I'm so thankful for her doing the house things and everything else. Folks, this is a full-time job now with what we do extra. And I told her, with eBay and Poshmark and doing this, she is a working machine. I'm very proud of her and very thankful for her. Well, Braden's behind the camera today and all the comments were so nice to him. He was so excited. He's reading the comments. "People are being nice, Dad." I said, "I'm glad. Thank God." And so, we're believing God for him, a spouse, that one day God has a woman for him that is ministry-minded, wants to be with the Lord, tongue-talking, Holy Ghost filled. We pray for his spouse. We pray for Paisley, you know, and Megan. We're believing for total restoration of Megan. She'll get married one day. But, you know, we're always praying for Braden to have a sweetheart one day. I always try to mess around with him because it's our thing. I told him, I said, "You'll get you a good woman, son. I know you will. We're believing God." Like my trophy over here? So, yeah. But, well, we want to talk about what we prayed about yesterday. And there was a lot to that, folks. That was heavy, and there's some things I see I just have to take a pause and go, "Wow." But what did we see about Mel Gibson? We saw that he needs—I don't know, and this is what I saw. I saw the number 50 million, to believe God for 50 million. Now, I don't know how all that money comes in these Hollywood celebrity movies and all that, but who would sponsor that? Maybe he has the money already. But I saw $50 million. Now, I don't know what that $50 million entails, but a $50 million budget, $50 million, whatever, a surplus, I don't know. But the other thing the Lord showed me was them coming against his ratings. Like, you know, whenever you're rated R or PG-13, trying to get it where people would be able to come in. Well, this is a rated R movie, we're not going to go watch that because we're believers, because we don't watch rated R movies. Trying to—not a lot of traffic is what I saw—trying to come against him. And I saw two different types of scenarios going, with more of a fictional look or a more biblical approach, kind of like The Chosen. You can go more fictional with movies or you can go more biblical, and I believe he should go more biblical. I don't think you should add fictional anything to the Bible. It confuses people. So, I think it would be smart for him to go biblical. That's what we are praying into. And the Lord's showing me again the revival taking place in the theaters. Now, I'm telling you, when this happens—I don't say if anymore, because when I know when God tells me something is going to happen, it's going to happen. But he said the enemy—I saw major occultic people in Hollywood trying to come against him with the occult, with witchcraft and stuff. And we were praying last—I'm telling you, this is a major prayer assignment. I'm telling you, when God puts you on an assignment and he says, "Brandon, this is going to bring many souls to my kingdom throughout the whole world, this is a major tool for what God's about to do in these last days." So, we pray for him that he stays the course and does it like The Passion of the Christ and hits a home run. That's what I'm praying, that he hits a home run. Okay, so now we'll go to the next thing. So then the Lord showed us box cars. That was another thing. I saw box cars. I saw Santa Fe. I saw it was a red-looking box car, like kind of faded-out looking colors. And then I saw a white cross with "Santa Fe" across it. And then I saw inside the door in a cargo, like a package, some kind of device. Now, I don't know what this device was. I can assume what it was, but I didn't see it go off. I saw the device. It had green letters on it. It looked like it was silver. It had some black on it. It looked like something out of a movie. And it was in like a crate thing in this box car, and it was going down the railroad tracks. And I could see green trees on the right and the left, and it was going, and it looked like it was headed up north. Headed up north, that was the direction of this train track. And I don't know what that was all about, but you know, whenever the Lord shows me a vision of something, I'm sure it's not a good thing. A train with something in it, I'm just saying. I don't know what that meant, but it was not like I felt like it was danger. I felt that this was a bad thing. Then number two, the Lord showed me the ocean. I saw Cuba, and remember I was praying over Cuba last night. And I could see Cuba, but I could see—I've never been to Cuba—but I could see like the electricity grid was not very good. I could see there wasn't a lot of lights on. But across the ocean, it looked completely black outside and people were moving at night. And I saw a biological—it was a clear container that had metal ends, and it had some kind of pathogen in it that was from Russia. Oh, God help me. And it was being smuggled into America. This pathogen, it was a container that was about this big. It was about that big around, and it was glass-looking. Now, what does that mean? I have no idea. But it was coming from Cuba, and it was being brought in at nighttime. It was completely dark outside. Number three, I saw Vegas. I saw Vegas. I saw the strip again. I saw rioting. I saw fires. I could see bad things happening in there. Then I could see it in Dallas. I could see a major uprising of protests and ICE—anti-ICE, anti-immigration, anti- all these people trying to do stupid stuff. And the Lord showed me a date, the 14th, to pray over the 14th. Now, after I brought that up, people say, "Hey, Brandon, there's rallies and all these things on the 14th." Folks, this is amazing to me because I was like, "Well, I told Diana," when you hear of the Lord and he tells you, gives you certain things, and he says, "Pray over Washington, D.C." I thought the 14th what I was praying over was the parade. And I still do. I don't know about all this protest on the 14th. People are sending that to us in emails. And Diana was talking to us. She said, "You're getting a lot of people saying there's rallies or whatever, like marches. Is that what you called them?" Marches on the 14th. So, I thought, well, maybe that's what I was seeing. But I never want to assume because I saw military parades and I saw events praying over our nation from the 14th, which would be Saturday, to the 4th of July, going after like I saw up until the 6th, praying over our nation for a hedge of protection over our president, over his granddaughter. I saw her face specifically. Her name is Kai. To pray over this young girl, she's 18 years old, and to pray over his grandchildren. Okay, so we pray over their grandchildren. We pray over his older, Eric and Don Jr., and the girls. We pray a hedge of protection over everyone, that no weapon formed against this family will prosper, over JD Vance, over our senators, all of it. We don't want any harm to come to anybody, folks. Regardless, we're believers. We're believing believers that believe in love and peace and joy, and we believe in protection over all people, regardless if you're Democrat, Republican, or whatever. It doesn't matter. It's human. And so, we just pray protection over people and that no calamity comes near. Still praying over Trump Tower, praying over his hotels, his golf courses that were targets, praying over his properties. It's like there's so much there, folks, like I'm saying. I'm just going to leave that there. I've warned you about Israel. I have seen strikes against Iran in the coming days with a white missile with USA on it. And it was shaped like a triangle, went in, and it was a weapon I've never seen before. I saw it in the days ahead. I'm telling you, folks, that I've seen Israel and America strike Iran. I warned you to pray over American bases in Iraq. Remember this. We need to pray a hedge of protection over our troops in Iraq in retaliation for what's about to take place. Praying over our men and women in service in foreign bases, especially Iraq. I saw Iraq specifically to pray over them. So, if you have your sons or your daughters or your husband or wife stationed in Iraq and they're fighting for our country, pray over them. Intercede for them. Plead the blood of Jesus over your family members. You especially, you have a covenant, they're your bloodline, pray for them even more. I'm believing God every one of them is safe and protected. But it's vital that you do this, that you cover your family. You take your seat of authority according to Ephesians every single day and make sure you draw a bloodline in the spirit realm around your loved ones so that no weapon formed against them will prosper. This is important times, folks. It's not a time to go, 'Well, you know, Brandon, your prayer group's got this. I'm going to take a nap.' No, it's time for you to rise up even more. The volcano out in Oregon—praying over that. I've warned you about a mile-wide volcano. I warned you that the Lord showed me a massive tsunami coming inland. Major stuff has taken place, great shakings to awaken. And the 10 cities, people asking about the 10 cities, and we pray over those 10 cities that there's no rioting, there's no craziness going on, an uprising with the Red Dawn experience with these people, that we have authority. We pray over that. You know, I'm always going to stand even if it happens. I try to not be the Debbie Downer and go, 'Well, you know, we didn't stop COVID. We didn't stop.' That wasn't my heart. I was trying to say you all need to be realistic and sometimes when you're trying to come across so religious, 'Well, Brandon, no.' I'm telling you, I believe more than a lot of people believe, not saying that I have it all together, but I'm standing with a lot of people that you all are safe, protected in the hand of the Lord, and that no weapon formed against you will prosper. A thousand shall fall at your side, and ten thousand at your right hand. That's why I told you it is so important. Just like Diana and I, we pray every day. God, if we don't feel a peace—we went into a store the other day, and Paisley came. She goes, 'You know, Daddy...'—cuz I'm trying to teach my kids, and it's so cute when our little kid does this—she goes, 'You know, Daddy, I felt uneasy in my spirit about that. Did you?' And I went, 'You did?' She goes, 'That man, he was sketchy, wasn't he?' And I said, 'What do you mean, babe?' She goes, 'I just noticed I just felt that funny feeling in my spirit just to stay close to you, and I was watching him.' And I said, 'That's exactly what I'm talking about. You're not judging people or profiling people. You're going with the peace of God that passes all understanding.' And as a little girl, she said, 'I felt uneasy inside, Dad. I didn't feel a peace.' And she goes, 'Did you feel a peace?' And I said, 'No, but God's trying to train you, too, as a little girl.' I just thought it's cool cuz I'm trying so hard to train my kids to be street smart and spiritually smart, that you hear the voice of the Lord, and if you feel a check inside, you flee from evil. You don't run to it. You flee because the Holy Spirit's trying to help you. He's here to lead and guide us in all things. You say, 'Don't go down that highway tonight. You need to not do that.' 'Well, why not?' 'Go another road. You're all right, go another road.' 'Well, that takes me ten minutes longer.' 'Just do what I ask you to do.' The willing and obedient will eat the good of the land. Even if it doesn't make sense, don't go down that highway today, going and following the peace of God. I said, 'Oh man, I—it's like with this Joseph Z conference this week. I want to go down there so bad, but I have a peace about it. Diana found out and said, 'Their tickets are sold out. Their tickets are sold out. I didn't know you had to register.' And I'm not going to be arrogant and just automatically assume that you're just going down there—'Well, I have a YouTube channel. Don't you want to let me in on the front row?' A man named Allan is going to be there. I don't know how to say his last name, I'm sorry. I think I'll butcher it. But there are some really cool voices in these last days, and I'm so glad it's sold out, that they had enough people down there. Dallas-Fort Worth is a spiritual hub. There are a lot of Christians down there in that area, a lot of believers, so I think he'll have a really good turnout. But, I don't know, I'm always just thinking—it's like going to Billy Burke meetings. I told D, 'Oh my gosh, I wish we could get closer. He's in Pittsburgh this weekend.' And I told her, I said, 'If we could go and fly up there for the weekend for Father's Day...' What a Father's Day present for me, to go to Billy Burke. But I'm not really big on flying. I'd rather drive. I'm just like, not that I'm afraid, I'll do it, but I just don't like going up that high. I told D, 'Well, we can drive.' 'No, we can't. I'm not driving 2,000 miles.' But that's just us. But we're believing God and we're looking at what's going on in the world right now. And I told her, I said, 'I feel we're on the verge of something major taking place.' And maybe, just maybe, this prophetic conference that Joseph Z is having this weekend and these other ministers—there's a lot of people getting there—maybe that's... but they're all gathering together to pray. It's in our heart to believe, and we believe we receive. And Father, I thank you, Lord. Father, I thank you, Lord, for the wealth transfer and the finances to get it done.
